steps.title: Read the coefficient
steps.content: The variable $t$ is measured in months, and the expression $0.2t$ is measured in inches. Therefore $0.2$ is the number of inches of growth per month.

steps.title: Match the interpretation
steps.content: The constant $3$ represents the starting length, and the $6$ represents the target length. The coefficient $0.2$ represents the length, in inches, Antwon's hair will grow each month. C is correct.
